brief_html: Moves item from the player's cursor buffer to an inventory space.
format:
(UINT32) Item ID
(UINT32) X coordinate
(UINT32) Y coordinate
(UINT32) Buffer Type

Possible Buffer Types:
0x00 - Character's inventory (backpack)
0x01 - NPC and other Trade Windows
0x02 - Trade window
0x03 - Horadric Cube
0x04 - Stash
remarks_html:
Moves item from the player's cursor buffer to an inventory space.

Please note: This message's official name is not known, and has been invented.

Inventory coordinates:
(0,0) - Top left
(9,3) - Bottom right
